Frequently Asked Questions

Yes! This is a legitimate promotional offer. Simply complete the required steps to receive your Sam's Club gift card reward.
Sam's Club gift cards are accepted in-store and online — groceries, electronics, fuel stations, and more. Full details will be in your reward email.
After completing all required steps, your $750 Sam's Club gift card code is sent directly to your email — usually within 24–48 hours.
Deals include free trials, app downloads, and short partner surveys. You choose which work best — typically 3–5 are required to unlock your reward.
No existing membership is required to participate or claim your reward. Anyone can take part and receive the gift card.
